## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 📋 Environment

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| Board | <!-- e.g., Radxa Rock 4D --> |
| OS | <!-- e.g., Debian 12 aarch64 --> |
| RKNN Toolkit Version | <!-- e.g., 2.3.2 --> |
| RKNN Runtime Version | <!-- e.g., librknnrt 1.6.0 --> |
| Model | <!-- e.g., ppocr-rk3576, qwen3-vl-rk3576 --> |
| Conda Env | <!-- e.g., rknn3, Python 3.10 --> |
| GCC Version | <!-- e.g., aarch64-none-linux-gnu-gcc 10.2 --> |

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.
